leadText: Shell Armor (Japanese: シェルアーマー Shell Armor) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Shell Armor prevents the Pokémon from receiving a critical hit , even from moves that normally always land one, namely Frost Breath , Storm Throw , Wicked Blow , Surging Strikes , Flower Trick , and any move boosted by Merciless (if the Pokémon is poisoned ) or Laser Focus . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Shell Armor has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Shell Armor prevents the Pokémon from receiving a critical hit , even from moves that normally always land one, namely Frost Breath , Storm Throw , Wicked Blow , Surging Strikes , Flower Trick , and any move boosted by Merciless (if the Pokémon is poisoned ) or Laser Focus .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Blocks critical hits. MD T D S Blocks critical hits on the Pokémon. B S L こうげきを きゅうしょに うけない Conq. The Pokémon is protected against critical hits. MD GtI Moves will not make a critical hit. * Moves don't hit critically! Never ever! * S MD Moves don't hit the Pokémon critically! Never ever! MD RT DX Moves are never critical hits against this Pokémon.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This Ability originated as a TCG Pokémon Power . Together with Protean , these are the only Abilities that more than one first partner Pokémon line can have as their Hidden Ability .
